message:
Dear Sales Manager,

The following quotation has been cancelled.

Details:
Quotation: {{ doc.name }}
Customer: {{ doc.customer_name or doc.party_name or "Not provided" }}
Transaction Date: {{ doc.transaction_date }}
Grand Total: {{ doc.grand_total }}
Cancellation Reason: {{ doc.custom_cancellation_reason or "Not provided" }}

You can view the document here:
{{ frappe.utils.get_url() }}/app/quotation/{{ doc.name }}

Regards,
ERP System
name: Quotation Cancelled Notification
subject: Quotation {{ doc.name }} Cancelled
